headline: Jack Ma-Backed Ant Group Set for High-Stakes Overhaul of Billion-User App
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Ant Group Co. is testing an overhaul to its Alipay super app that would introduce an AI agent interface, a major escalation in its battle for users with archrival WeChat.Most Read from BloombergIran’s Deputy Foreign Minister Confirms Deal Reached With USIran Signals No Deal Will Be Signed by Trump’s Sunday TimelineUS and Iran Agree to Halt War, Restart Middle East Oil ShipmentsWhy Musk Raced to Take SpaceX Public in the World’s Biggest IPOIran Pushes Differing Deal Versions as US

content.title: Jack Ma-Backed Ant Group Set for High-Stakes Overhaul of Billion-User App
content.summary: (Bloomberg) -- Ant Group Co. is testing an overhaul to its Alipay super app that would introduce an AI agent interface, a major escalation in its battle for users with archrival WeChat.Most Read from BloombergIran’s Deputy Foreign Minister Confirms Deal Reached With USIran Signals No Deal Will Be Signed by Trump’s Sunday TimelineUS and Iran Agree to Halt War, Restart Middle East Oil ShipmentsWhy Musk Raced to Take SpaceX Public in the World’s Biggest IPOIran Pushes Differing Deal Versions as US
